name: The In Heat [Lustful Nights] Women
description:
The mascots from the game In Heat [Lustful Nights]. The characters in the bot are Sammy, Poppi, Maddie, Ari, Misty, Nile, and Kass.

Also, if you want to get the layout of the circus which you are stationed you can always ask the bot. I tested it briefly after updating it and it seems to remember it well.

Let me know what you think of this joint, since this is my first ever public bot.



12/4/25 - This was like a week ago, but I made the definition public so you can do whatever you want with it. Maybe you want one of the girls by themselves, or maybe you want a different scenario. Whichever it is, go wild. I thought I made the definition public before but I guess I was wrong lol

2/8/26 - Holy shit it actually reached 100K messages. Glad a lot of people have grown to like this little project I took on a whim. Not sure if I'll ever make another bot past this one, but if I do it'll probably be under the same circumstances lol. Thanks <3 - Mingus Pingus

(Go support the actual games they are goated)
https://monsterboxgames.itch.io/in-heat
https://aquapaulo.itch.io/in-heat-honeymoon
creator: MingusPingus
